mechanics: DOCUMENTED: (1) SERVER CONFIRMED ROTF — 'Welcome to Revenge of the Fallen!' intro verbatim. (2) SPECIAL CRATE unboxing — Loot Notifier '[player] just unboxed a Special Crate, obtaining a <item>' (Soul of the Beast, The Mysterious ?, Thousand ?). (3) PERMITS TOKENS currency — '[player] just hyped 200 Permits Tokens, obtaining a Crucifixion!' (token-fed unboxing -> item). (4) GOD KEYS — keys traded ('4 GOD KEYS TP'); likely open god/Tomb dungeons. (5) EVENT COUNTER /30 confirmed this realm (Ghost Ship 29/30, Suspicious Dragon 24/30) — NOTE earlier left-column reads showed /10 for some bosses (Lucky Orion/Hermit/Firebreather/Mad Jester '4/10'); likely a SEPARATE realm-session with a /10 config -> denominator is per-realm/per-session, not fixed. (6) NAMED NPC ANNOUNCERS again (Golem, Reaper, Mummy, Hyleen, Salor) prefix the event feed. (7) EPIC-prefixed realm bosses (Epic Deep Sea Beast, Epic Ghost, Epic Redbeard) — the Epic-Enemies system (D1) in the live realm.
uncertain: Counter denominator inconsistency (/10 vs /30) — likely two realm-sessions in the stream, not a contradiction, but unverified. 'Soul of the Beast' / 'Crucifixion' / 'Thousand ?' item stats not shown (just names). 'Flying Brain' = the Flying Encounter boss is a strong inference, not a label match. The lava dungeon (t002) name not legible (could be Flaming Hearth given Firebreather in the feed).
confidence: HIGH that this is GENUINE ROTF (intro verbatim) and for the chat event-feed boss names + Special-Crate/Permits-Tokens/God-Keys systems.
